mapper.update: /* OptionMgmtCommandRepository.updatePrOptnClssCd */ UPDATE pr_optn_clss_cd SET sort_seq = #{sortSeq}, use_yn = #{useYn}, sys_mod_id = #{sysModId}, sys_mod_dtm = NOW() WHERE optn_cat_no = #{optnCatNo}

/* OptionMgmtCommandRepository.updatePrOptnCd */ UPDATE pr_optn_cd SET sort_seq = #{sortSeq}, use_yn = #{useYn}, img_path_nm = #{imgPathNm}, img_file_nm = #{imgFileNm}, rgb_val = #{rgbVal}, sys_mod_id = #{sysModId}, sys_mod_dtm = NOW() WHERE optn_cat_no = #{optnCatNo} AND optn_no = #{optnNo}
